milestone_suggestion.name: Phase 1
milestone_suggestion.summary: Scope lock, core implementation, and highest-priority path.

milestone_suggestion.name: Phase 2
milestone_suggestion.summary: Backend workflows, admin features, or payment-related work.

milestone_suggestion.name: Final Polish
milestone_suggestion.summary: QA, refinements, responsive fixes, and deployment support.

assumptions: Estimate assumes standard business-hour collaboration and one main decision-maker.
Estimate assumes no major hidden legacy constraints beyond what was provided.
exclusions: Hosting, third-party subscriptions, and platform fees are excluded unless explicitly stated.
Major scope changes after approval may change the estimate.

reasons: Budget appears viable relative to estimated range.

reduced_scope.summary: Current target budget appears compatible with the estimated entry range.
notes: No reduction required based on the current estimate range.

prompt_bundle.compact_text:
Project type: web_app
Source kind: manual
Title: Demo
Description: Need a clean MVP.

Seriousness: low (44/100)

reasons: Budget appears viable relative to estimated range.
